expectations.evidence: Response contains @dataclass decorator and multiple references to 'dataclass' throughout
Response contains 'class RawRecord(BaseModel)' and 'class ApiEnrichment(BaseModel)' in the code

expectations.text: Uses Pydantic at the pipeline entry point (CSV parsing) and for external API responses
expectations.evidence: RawRecord(BaseModel) validates CSV rows at Stage 1, ApiEnrichment(BaseModel) validates API responses in Stage 2, both explicitly called out as trust boundaries

expectations.text: Uses dataclass or plain objects for data flowing between internal pipeline stages, OR explains the tradeoff if using Pydantic throughout
expectations.evidence: EnrichedRecord is @dataclass(frozen=True) and flows between all three stages internally; also explains tradeoff: 'Pydantic has validation overhead and signals untrusted boundary to readers'

expectations.text: Does NOT add Pydantic validation at every internal handoff — validates at boundaries, trusts internally
expectations.evidence: Stage 3 comment 'No validation needed — data is trusted at this point'; internal stages pass EnrichedRecord dataclass without re-validating; Pydantic only used at CSV input and API response boundaries
